security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self' blob:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob:

bundle.shortDescription: A native macOS swarm manager for Codex agents, with an autonomous Conductor per project.
bundle.longDescription: SwarmZ runs and orchestrates a swarm of native Codex agents (codex app-server sessions), organized in project tabs, with an autonomous AI Conductor per project that decomposes goals onto named sub-agents in git worktrees, steers and reviews them, sets follow-up timers and learns your preferences. Optional local gh integration surfaces and manages GitHub PRs. App state stays on your machine; model traffic goes to OpenAI through the Codex CLI (your ChatGPT sign-in). No OAuth or tokens ever touch SwarmZ.
